ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category of the product (e.g., Carpet Cleaners, Spot Cleaners) */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Unique model number for the product */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the product */,
  "cord_length" TEXT /* Cord length of the product */,
  "tank_capacity" TEXT /* Tank capacity of the product */,
  "pet_friendly" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is pet-friendly */,
  "special_features" TEXT /* Special features of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "warranty_period" INTEGER /* Duration of the warranty in months */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the product was added to the system */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date when the product information was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the product is currently active */,
  "pet_type" TEXT /* Type of pet for which the product is suitable */,
  "recommended_use" TEXT /* Recommended use cases for the product */,
  "compatibility" TEXT /* Compatibility with other products or systems */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the category is currently active */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the feature belongs to */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the feature is currently active */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the feature was added */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date when the feature was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_features_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was posted */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the review has received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the review has received */,
  "is_verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the review is from a verified purchase */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the review is currently active */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who wrote the review (for tracking and security) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, admin, sales, support) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address to which the order will be shipped */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Address for billing */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the order is currently active */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "item_price" REAL /* Price of the product at the time of the order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the item */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the order item is currently active */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the item was added to the order */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date when the item information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in the inventory */,
  "quantity_available" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product available */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last updated */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Minimum quantity at which a reorder should be initiated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the inventory record is currently active */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the inventory record was added */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date when the inventory record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the supplier is currently active */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the supplier was added to the system */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date when the supplier information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_suppliers" (
  "product_supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product-supplier relationship */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "supply_date" TEXT /* Date the product was supplied */,
  "supply_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product supplied */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the product-supplier relationship is currently active */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the relationship was added */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_suppliers_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_suppliers_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions granted to the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the role is currently active */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the role was added */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date when the role information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_mapping" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user-role mapping is currently active */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the mapping was added */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date when the mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_mapping_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_mapping_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "is_main_image" INTEGER /* Indicates if the image is the main image for the product */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the image was added */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date when the image information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_images_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
